summary: Design market-specific daily PnL comparison against separate TW and US market-close baselines for scheduled quote pushes.
assumptions: Only each active market's total unrealized PnL is compared; per-symbol comparison is out of scope.
TW close snapshot is captured around 14:10 Asia/Taipei on Monday-Friday.
US close snapshot is captured around 04:10 Asia/Taipei on Tuesday-Saturday and stores the previous calendar date as the US trading date.
Scheduled delta messages do not display cross-market total PnL.
Redis daily snapshots are sufficient for MVP; no new database table or Alembic migration is required.
If appending to the existing rich quote message is invasive, a second compact Telegram message after the quote push is acceptable.
